creator: zirias@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Dave Hayes from comment #17)
I wasn't even aware it was also broken in the Q4 branch. Of course, just cherry-picking there makes little sense given it's a different libressl version. But then, we'd need a different patch for quarterly -- just upgrading to a *development* version is certainly not a thing to do on quarterly.

So, if you want the PR reopened to track the issue on quarterly, that's fine. Not sure there are much chances we'll see a patch in the remaining 20 days until the next quarterly though ...
